settings_2fa_desc: Apeapea se tulaga faaopoopo aga mo le oe account. E manaomia se Authenticator app (faatusa Google Authenticator, Authy).

settings_2fa_step1: 1. Saini le QR code fa'atasi le oe Authenticator app:
settings_2fa_step2: 2. Tusi le 6-digit code mai le app:

settings_2fa_disable_label: E faagaioiina, tusi lo oe password:
settings_2fa_disable_hint: Faagaioiina Leai 2FA — e manaomia le setup fou afai ua faagaioiina toe
settings_api_save_hint: Teu le AI key — fa'aaogaina ma Fernet encryption
settings_users_search: Saili tagata (igoa o tagata po o email)...
help_system_desc1: FastWrite o se meaola i lo oe olasiga mo le fa'amatalagataga amataga mai pepa (teua, moni nai ia, talosiga) fa'aaogaina artificial intelligence (AI). O lo'o fa'agaoioia lava i lo oe olasiga — o oe fa'amatalaga e le avatua i se tasi, fa'apea fo'i le administrator.
help_system_desc2: Talofa fea: E ataui se PDF ma se tasi po o le tele o teua. O le sistema o lo'o fa'amatalagataga na lima teua, o lo'o saili le supplier, o lo'o fa'asoaina le faasiina talafeagai, ma o lo'o ataula le fa'amatalaga na e faitau (nambala o teua, aso, tupe, mea laina, imi.). I le iuga, e ataui e oe i le CSV po o Excel.
help_step1_desc: Alu i le Settings → API Keys ma tusi lo oe AI key (faatusa Google Gemini). O lenei e tatau ona - o le platform e le alu mai sa na key. O le tupe e amata tutupu i le oe AI account.
help_step2_desc: Alu i le Upload & Extract. Toso pe filifili le faila o PDF (seia i le 200 teua pa le faila) ma puasi "Register Documents". O le sistema o lo'o fa'amatalagataga teua ma supplier.
help_step3_desc: Mai le Documents page, filifili se tasi po o le tele o pepa ma puasi "Labels". E ave oe i se pepa auiliili i le soifua na e tinitini teua i le agavale ma le faasiina fomu i le taumatau. Fa'amatalagataga mea na e malamalama (faatusa nambala o teua, aso, tupe atoa, VAT) ma mea laina. Fa'apea fo'i, faia se faasiina mai le Labels page → + New Label.
help_step4_desc: Mai le Documents page, filifili pepa ma puasi "Batch". O le sistema o lo'o fa'aaogaina AI e ataula fa'amatalaga i tusi o le faasiina o ia mea. Iloiloga ua to mai le table.
help_step5_desc: Mai le Documents page, filifili pepa ma puasi "Approve". E tinitini oe teua i le agavale ma ataula fa'amatalaga i le taumatau. Toe fautua fa'alepulepu ma puasi "Approve Invoice". O le fa'aluga o le sync e fa'aluga i malae e talafeagai i le pepa i le taimi o oe fealofani i laina.
help_step6_desc: Ina ua fa'atanaga pepa, toe alu i le Documents page. Filifili fa'atanaga pepa ma puasi "CSV", "XLSX" po "Line Items XLSX" e ataula. Afai leai se filifilia, pepa fa'atanaga atoa o lo'o ataula.
help_tip_text: O le fa'asoaina talafeagai o: Upload → Labels → Batch → Approve → Export. Muamua faia faasiina mo ituaiga atoa o teua (faatusa DEI, COSMOTE, VODAFONE) ona amata ai le tele ataula. Afai e oe na faia se faasiina, o le sistema o lo'o fa'asoaina fa'atasi teua fou mai le supplier e tasi.
